verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Each year's a new beginning As life continues on Brings memories of the day that you were born And though there be other days In the year that has much work There is only one that testifies of your birth

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: This is the day of reflection And you can look back and see The many years you have come through And what they were meant to be And as you stand at this place Surely you could see God's grace That has you here to celebrate The beginning of your new year.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Happy birthday to you Enjoy it all the way May God's blessings be on you Even beyond this day Happy birthday to you May you be filled with joy Happy birthday! Happy birthday! Happy birthday!

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: This new chapter has been opened In the book your life unfolds Your future is a plan That God now holds Whether you walk through valleys And when you climb up Mountains high Just be encouraged That the Lord is always at your side

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Look ahead to the day When age would no more be Even there you would live With God eternally But as you stand at this place We can all see God's grace And we're with you here to celebrate The beginning of your new year
